name: Alternative Insurance Test Election

eligibility.description: Applicable when the corporation's insurance liabilities are between 10% and 25% of assets due to specific runoff or rating circumstances.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows shareholders to elect to treat a foreign corporation as a qualifying insurance corporation even if it fails the 25% liability test, provided it meets a 10% threshold and is predominantly engaged in insurance.
